Download the following CSV files from Dryad and place them in this directory:

  Dryad DOI: https://datadryad.org/dataset/doi:10.5061/dryad.zw3r228fw

  From trajectories_for_figures/:
    orco_laminar1.csv
    orco_traj2.csv
    orco_traj3.csv

These are individual Orco-mutant flight trajectories recorded under laminar wind (0.4 m/s).
They are used in notebooks/model_training.ipynb to evaluate heading predictions on external data.

Column mapping applied by the notebook:
  obj_id_unique  →  trajec_objid
  x              →  position_x
  y              →  position_y
  heading        →  heading_angle
  xvel           →  velocity_x
  yvel           →  velocity_y

Wind conditions added by the notebook (not present in raw files):
  windspeed       = 0.4 m/s
  windspeed_angle = -π  (wind from +x direction)
